rule_text: The icon badge is a White #ffffff rounded square holding the line icon (Brand Blue #00529b stroke), vertically centered on the box and horizontally centered on the box's left edge so the edge is the badge's perpendicular bisector (50% over the blue, 50% over the page background).
intent: Define the badge appearance and its 50/50 edge placement.
summary: Icon badge: White #ffffff rounded square with Brand Blue #00529b line icon, vertically centered, horizontally centered on left box edge, edge as badge's perpendicular bisector.
